paper.title: Effect of elevated temperature on physico-mechanical properties of blended cement concrete
paper.authors: Hosam.El_Din H. Seleem; Alaa M. Rashad; Tarek Elsokary
paper.material_system: blended cement concrete exposed to elevated temperature
paper.notes: Mix table is extractable; compressive-strength values appear figure-only.

strength_results.notes: Residual compressive strength values require digitization from figures.

evidence.evidence_text: Mixture designation table lists cement, MK, SF, FA, GGBS, water and HRWR for M1-M17.
Packet contains compressive-strength figure/page candidates for elevated-temperature blended cement concrete but no readable numeric table.

review_queue.question: Digitize compressive-strength/elevated-temperature curves and map them to M1-M17 mixtures.
review_queue.suggested_action: Human review required before database insertion.

main_risks: Some strength candidates require human review or figure digitization.
